h1.visual_description: Bold, larger serif font, prefixed with a section number followed by a period.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Formal definition block; the term being defined is typically italicized immediately following the label.
Equation identifier/numbering, right-aligned with display math.
Internal cross-reference to another document section.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX (inline: $...$, display: $$...$$ or equation environments with right-aligned numbering)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Italicized running header at the top left (e.g., 'Probability, Combinatorics and Control') and numeric page numbers at the bottom left.
